name: Arcanika
short_description: Travel to a storybook world and help its denizens bring life back to the glade. Their world is in danger. The life force that once made things grow has disappeared and they need your help to restore it. Complete exciting Match-3 puzzles while earning treasure and achievements along the way.
detailed_description:
Travel to a storybook world and help its denizens bring life back to the glade. Their world is in danger. The life force that once made things grow has disappeared and they need your help to restore it. Complete exciting Match-3 puzzles while earning treasure and achievements along the way. Use your keen landscaping abilities to restore the glade to its former self.

* Restore life back to the glade
* Unlock all of the achievements to earn bonuses
* Earn power-ups to help you complete tasks
* Solve over 70 thrilling Match3 levels
about_the_game:
Travel to a storybook world and help its denizens bring life back to the glade. Their world is in danger. The life force that once made things grow has disappeared and they need your help to restore it. Complete exciting Match-3 puzzles while earning treasure and achievements along the way. Use your keen landscaping abilities to restore the glade to its former self.

* Restore life back to the glade
* Unlock all of the achievements to earn bonuses
* Earn power-ups to help you complete tasks
* Solve over 70 thrilling Match3 levels
supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Czech, Polish, Russian
*languages with full audio support
